renderDetails.messageTitle: Error from First batch archive writer (archive_writer)

content: The subagent First batch archive writer (archive_writer) with id "b4b935c8-8c17-4464-a3e5-a911e7b05b59" encountered an error and has either stopped or failed to start execution: RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED (code 429): You have exhausted your capacity on this model. Resets in 0s.
